requirement_topic.en: China GB Baseline Versus Turkey Market-Access Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB基线与土耳其市场准入证据
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB基線與土耳其市場准入證據

summary.en: For Turkey, Chinese GB reports should be treated as technical background unless the Turkish customer, TSE route, grid operator, insurer, or authority accepts them for a defined purpose. Turkey-facing evidence usually needs to be mapped to CE-aligned product rules, TS EN IEC 62619 battery safety evidence, IEC 62933 system-safety evidence where applicable, UN 38.3 transport records, EPDK / grid-operator project documentation, and local fire-safety review.
summary.zh: 对于土耳其，中国GB报告应视为技术背景文件，除非土耳其客户、TSE路径、电网企业、保险方或主管机关为特定用途接受该报告。面向土耳其的证据通常需要映射到CE对应产品规则、TS EN IEC 62619电池安全证据、适用时的IEC 62933系统安全证据、UN 38.3运输记录、EPDK/电网企业项目文件以及当地消防安全审查。
summary.zht: 對於土耳其，中國GB報告應視為技術背景文件，除非土耳其客戶、TSE路徑、電網企業、保險方或主管機關為特定用途接受該報告。面向土耳其的證據通常需要映射到CE對應產品規則、TS EN IEC 62619電池安全證據、適用時的IEC 62933系統安全證據、UN 38.3運輸記錄、EPDK/電網企業項目文件以及當地消防安全審查。

standards_or_laws: TSE / TS EN standards for battery and electrical equipment
EPDK and Turkish grid-operator project requirements

summary.en: The China baseline for stationary lithium-ion BESS commonly includes GB 44240-2024 for compulsory lithium-ion cell and battery safety for electric energy storage, GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium-ion batteries for electric energy storage, and GB/T 36558 for electrochemical energy storage systems connected to power systems. GB 44240-2024 is a GB mandatory standard; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558 are recommended national standards but can become project requirements through procurement, grid review, or acceptance.
summary.zh: 固定式锂离子BESS的中国基线通常包括GB 44240-2024（电力储能用锂离子电池和电池组安全强制标准）、GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）和GB/T 36558（接入电力系统的电化学储能系统通用技术要求）。GB 44240-2024为GB强制标准；GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558为推荐性国家标准，但可能通过采购、并网审查或验收成为项目要求。
summary.zht: 固定式鋰離子BESS的中國基線通常包括GB 44240-2024（電力儲能用鋰離子電池和電池組安全強制標準）、GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）和GB/T 36558（接入電力系統的電化學儲能系統通用技術要求）。GB 44240-2024為GB強制標準；GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558為推薦性國家標準，但可能透過採購、併網審查或驗收成為項目要求。

gap.en: The main gap is not only test content; it is recognition and legal purpose. A CN report may prove that a design was tested under a Chinese method, but Turkey-facing market access usually needs Turkish/EU-aligned legal classification, technical documentation, Turkish-language safety information, importer responsibility, and separate project approvals where the BESS will be installed or grid-connected.
gap.zh: 主要差距不只是测试内容，而是认可和法律用途。中国报告可证明设计按中国方法测试，但面向土耳其的市场准入通常还需要土耳其/EU对应法律分类、技术文件、土耳其语安全信息、进口商责任，以及BESS安装或并网所需的单独项目批准。
gap.zht: 主要差距不只是測試內容，而是認可和法律用途。中國報告可證明設計按中國方法測試，但面向土耳其的市場准入通常還需要土耳其/EU對應法律分類、技術文件、土耳其語安全資訊、進口商責任，以及BESS安裝或併網所需的單獨項目批准。

mandatory_status.target: Turkey requirements are mandatory only where the product, shipment, installation, EPDK status, or grid connection is in scope of a binding Turkish rule; TS EN / IEC standards may be voluntary technical evidence unless made mandatory by law, tender, insurer, or contract
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for in-scope electric-energy-storage lithium-ion cells and batteries; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558 are recommended national standards that may be contractually or project-required

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation / National Public Service Platform for Standards Information

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use China GB evidence as a starting point for technical mapping, not as Turkey market approval. Build a separate Turkey evidence matrix for CE-aligned product rules, TS EN / IEC standards, transport, EPDK/grid, and local fire-safety review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [INFORMATIONAL] 中国GB证据可作为技术映射起点，但不能视为土耳其市场批准。应针对CE对应产品规则、TS EN / IEC标准、运输、EPDK/电网及当地消防安全审查建立单独土耳其证据矩阵。
compliance_verdict.zht: [INFORMATIONAL] 中國GB證據可作為技術映射起點，但不能視為土耳其市場批准。應針對CE對應產品規則、TS EN / IEC標準、運輸、EPDK/電網及當地消防安全審查建立單獨土耳其證據矩陣。
